title: ListBox Control
description: A ListBox control displays a list of items from which the operator can select one or more.
examples:
GSet frmSetup.lstModels.AddItem, "Model1"
GSet frmSetup.lstModels.AddItem, "Model2"
GSet frmSetup.lstModels.AddItem, "Model3"

Integer i, count
String item$
GGet frmSetup.lstModels.ListCount, count
For i = 0 To count - 1 GGet frmSetup.lstModels.List(i), item$
Next i
